test_cases.title: Verify voice input capture and processing in chat application
steps: Speak a message into the microphone
Verify that the spoken message is correctly captured and converted to text
test_cases.expected_result: The voice input is accurately transcribed to text and sent as a chat message without errors.

test_cases.title: Validate audio playback quality and synchronization in chat responses
steps: Receive a voice message in the chat application
Evaluate audio clarity and synchronization with UI indicators
test_cases.expected_result: Audio playback is clear, correctly synchronized with the UI, and free from distortion or lag.

test_cases.title: Ensure security and privacy compliance for voice data
steps: Transmit a voice message through the chat application
Monitor data transmission for encryption and compliance with data protection standards
Attempt unauthorized access to voice data
test_cases.expected_result: Voice data is encrypted during transmission and storage; unauthorized access attempts are blocked and logged.

test_cases.title: Confirm voice feature availability and fallback behavior on unsupported devices
steps: Launch the chat application on a device that does not support voice input
Attempt to activate the voice feature
test_cases.expected_result: Voice feature is disabled and the application gracefully informs the user or falls back to text input.

test_cases.title: Test integration between voice module and existing chat messaging backend
steps: Verify backend receives and processes the message correctly
Check database entries and message delivery
test_cases.expected_result: Voice messages are successfully processed and delivered via the existing backend without errors or data loss.

results.failure_analysis: Voice input capture intermittently fails due to incomplete microphone hardware integration; transcription service times out leading to incorrect or missing text conversion.
Encryption applied on voice data is missing a critical certificate update resulting in non-compliance; unauthorized access attempts detected but some logs were incomplete.
